title: Exercises: Key Milestones in PQC Standardization

exercises.title: Interactive Timeline Creation
exercises.description: Create a detailed visual timeline of the NIST PQC standardization process.
tasks: List all major milestones from 2016 to 2024
Include exact dates where available
Note the number of algorithms at each stage
Highlight critical events (breaks, selections)
Add brief descriptions of significance for each milestone
exercises.expectedOutput: A comprehensive timeline document with at least 15 key dates
hints: Start with December 2016 call for proposals
Don't forget the Rainbow and SIKE breaks

exercises.title: Algorithm Attrition Analysis
exercises.description: Analyze why algorithms were eliminated at each round.
tasks: Research 3 algorithms eliminated after Round 1
Research 3 algorithms eliminated after Round 2
Explain the specific reasons for each elimination
Identify common patterns in eliminations
Discuss what this teaches about algorithm design
exercises.expectedOutput: An analysis document with specific examples and patterns
hints: Look for cryptanalysis papers in IACR ePrint
Some eliminations were for performance, not security

exercises.title: Migration Timeline Planning
exercises.description: Create a PQC migration timeline for a hypothetical organization.
tasks: Define the organization type (e.g., bank, hospital, government)
Identify all cryptographic systems that need migration
Create a phased migration timeline from 2024 to 2030
Account for testing, certification, and deployment phases
Address the 'harvest now, decrypt later' threat for sensitive data
exercises.expectedOutput: A detailed migration plan with phases and milestones
hints: Start with an inventory of cryptographic systems

exercises.title: Future Milestone Prediction
exercises.description: Predict and justify upcoming PQC milestones beyond 2024.
tasks: Predict when FN-DSA (FALCON) will be finalized
Estimate Round 4 KEM decision timeline
Project browser/TLS adoption milestones
Estimate when quantum computers might threaten RSA-2048
Propose a realistic 'PQC mandatory' deadline for enterprises
exercises.expectedOutput: A prediction document with justifications based on historical patterns
hints: Use NIST's past timelines as reference
Research quantum computing roadmaps from IBM, Google
